dag.description: Singleton pipeline for CradleDataLoading training data step

metadata.name: cradle_data_loading_singleton
metadata.description: Singleton pipeline for CradleDataLoading training data step

agent_context.when_to_use: Standalone data loading step: validate Cradle SQL query, test MDS connectivity, or extract data for offline analysis. Single-node pipeline for data exploration.
agent_context.when_not_to_use: If you need training or any downstream processing (use a full pipeline DAG). This is purely for data extraction/validation.
differentiators: Single node — smallest possible Cursus pipeline
Output can be inspected before committing to a full pipeline

prerequisites.how: Role has Cradle read permissions and MDS dataset exists

common_pitfalls: Output goes to S3 but no downstream consumer — must check artifacts manually
Large queries may timeout — add date range filters to Cradle SQL
Not meant for production pipelines — use as debugging/exploration tool
